refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation, task scheduling, and resource utilization.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and high-level; decomposing it into sub-FRs focused on key productivity drivers (equipment operation efficiency, task scheduling, resource utilization) allows targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations; verify each sub-FR by monitoring corresponding KPIs such as equipment uptime, task completion rates, and resource allocation efficiency.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Schedule tasks efficiently to minimize idle time.
FR3: Utilize resources effectively to support productivity.

candidate_dps: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize equipment throughput.
DP2: Intelligent task scheduling system to optimize task assignments and sequencing.
DP3: Resource management framework to allocate and monitor resources dynamically.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Advanced vehicle control algorithms to maximize equipment throughput.

potential_sources: Interaction between vehicle control and task scheduling modules.
Resource management dependencies on vehicle operation status.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 is logically decoupled from task scheduling and resource management at this level; interfaces can be defined to manage interactions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes vehicle control algorithms can be modularized independently.
Risk that poor integration with scheduling or resource modules may reduce overall productivity.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider refining DP interfaces with scheduling and resource modules in next decomposition level.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and software components responsible for vehicle operation and control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Vehicle control module sends operational data to NGHE Solution for monitoring.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives task assignments and scheduling information from NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Communication channel for remote control and data exchange.

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle control logic partially contained but heavily diffused across NGHE Solution.
Vehicle module contains most control logic with minimal diffusion.
Teleoperation module has some control logic overlap but limited containment.
Minimal relevance to vehicle control algorithms.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Vehicle module is the best architectural boundary to contain the advanced vehicle control algorithms, minimizing diffusion and enabling clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry.
Risk of duplicated control logic if teleoperation module overlaps.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Clarify interface contracts and ensure single ownership of control algorithms to avoid diffusion.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (advanced vehicle control algorithms) logically satisfies the refined FR (optimize equipment operation) with clear verification paths.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion risk with teleoperation module due to overlapping control functions.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment scores, supporting architectural clarity.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via telemetry data and operational KPIs collected from the Vehicle module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of control algorithms to Vehicle module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Define precise interface specifications between Vehicle and Teleoperation modules to reduce diffusion.
Plan next-level decomposition for task scheduling and resource management FRs.

decision.justification: Current level decomposition and assignments meet criteria with acceptable coupling and containment; no immediate need to zigzag or revise.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operation to maximize throughput.
FR2: Schedule tasks efficiently to minimize idle time.
FR3: Utilize resources effectively to support productivity.

revise.why: No significant issues detected requiring revision at this level.

assumptions: Vehicle control algorithms can be modularized within Vehicle module.
Interfaces with Teleoperation and NGHE Solution modules will be well-defined.
open_risks: Potential diffusion of control logic with Teleoperation module.
Integration risks with task scheduling and resource management modules.
evidence_needed: Interface compliance verification between Vehicle and other modules.
